query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS translation_contributors (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  userName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  totalSuggestions INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  approvedSuggestions INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  rejectedSuggestions INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  totalVotesReceived INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  score INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  rank ENUM('beginner', 'contributor', 'expert', 'master') DEFAULT 'beginner' NOT NULL,
  languages JSON,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
